content: Conta Azul is a subscription-based cloud ERP for Brazilian SMBs (acquired by Visma). Their MEI plan costs around R$119.90-R$159.90/month. Features: NF-e/NFS-e/NFC-e issuance, accounts payable/receivable, automated billing reminders (SMS/WhatsApp/email), bank reconciliation, inventory control, sales/customer management, financial reports, accountant integrations, companion mobile app. Clearly positioned for businesses larger than pure MEI needs.
